heading: Omitted
label: 786 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for the unclaimed and unpaid share of certain judgment funds to be deposited in the Treasury of the United States to the credit of the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–76, § 181 Stat. 177Aug. 29, 1967
